item.title: Nintendo Expands Switch 2's GameCube Library This Week
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon XD: Gale Of Darkness is here

Last month, during the Pokémon Day celebrations, it was announced the GameCube role-playing title Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness was on the way to Switch 2.

In case you missed it, here's your reminder that it's now officially available to Switch 2 users with a Switch Online + Expansion Pack. This game will be followed by Pokémon Colosseum at some point in the future.

In XD, the focus is on catching Shadow Pokémon, including Shadow Lugia. You can find out what other games are available for the Switch 2's GameCube library in our full guide.

Will you be revisiting this game on the Switch 2? Let us know in the comments.

Liam is a news writer and reviewer on Nintendo Life. He's been writing about games for more than 15 years and is a lifelong fan of many iconic video game characters.
